name: Number C107: Neo Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０７ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超銀河眼の時空龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネオ・ギャラクシーアイズ・タキオン・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakunana Neo Gyarakushīaizu Takion Doragon
name_jp_rom_base: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakunana Chōgingagan no Jikūryū
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 107: Neo Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Dragon
desc:
3 Level 9 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; until the end of this turn, negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects on the field. If this card has "Number 107: Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Dragon" as material, it gains this effect.
● You can Tribute 2 monsters; this card can make up to 3 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase this turn.

mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
